action.reasoning: Observation: Best is 0.793 from iter_14. Recent evals stuck at 0.790-0.791. With 0.31h remaining, I need to try to match or beat 0.793. The difference between 0.793 and 0.791 is very small. Let me try slightly different ensemble weights - maybe CLIP weight=0.8 instead of 0.7 will help. Also, I notice the few-shot accuracy (0.6368) is still the bottleneck. Let me try to boost CLIP weight since CLIP tends to generalize better to rare classes. Decision: Try ConvNeXt=1.0, CLIP=0.8, v3=0.6 and submit eval.
